nginx_test_stderr_summary: nginx syntax is ok and configuration test is successful; initial default error_log alert was non-fatal in offline user-mode test
policy_result: Read-only Nginx reverse proxy template is syntactically valid under nginx -t after using unprivileged offline test ports. The production template keeps HTTPS 443 and HTTP 80, proxies only the Web Console on 127.0.0.1:18893, does not proxy intake 127.0.0.1:18892, blocks POST /api/goals, blocks non-read root methods, and requires Basic Auth. Public installation is still pending and must not enable submit by default.
